findings.description: The sentence '障害通知ログのフォーマットには`$message$`のみ含まれ、障害解析ログのフォーマットには`$message$$information$$stackTrace$`が含まれる。これにより障害解析ログのみにStack Trace Informationが出力される。' is editorial interpretation not explicitly stated in the source. The source only shows the configuration format strings; it does not make this comparative statement.
findings.source_evidence: The source provides log.properties configuration examples with format strings (e.g., `$date$ -$logLevel$- ... $message$` and `... $message$$information$$stackTrace$`) but does not include any explanatory sentence describing or comparing the presence of these placeholders across log types.

findings.description: `BasicLogFormatter` is a PascalCase class name appearing in the s2 configuration example (`writer.monitorFile.formatter.className=nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter`) but is absent from the s2 hints array.
`UserNotFoundException` (XxxException pattern) and `ApplicationException` (PascalCase class name) appear in the s4 code examples but are absent from the s4 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4 code example: `catch (UserNotFoundException e) { throw new ProcessAbnormalEnd(100, e, "UM900003"); }` and `throw new ProcessAbnormalEnd(100, new ApplicationException(context.getMessages()), "UM900001");`
